---
name: Platform Support Request
about: Request support for a new AI IDE or CLI
title: '[PLATFORM] '
labels: platform-request

---

**Which platform would you like supported?**
E.g., Aider, Copilot Workspace, etc.

**Documentation Links**
Please provide links to the documentation covering how agents/skills are defined in this platform.

**Format**
Does this platform use Markdown, JSON, YAML for prompts?
